title: Procurement Data Schema
description:
JSON Schema for Solicitation and Requisition data, including mappings from source fields for GraphQL SDL translation.

NOTE: This schema has been updated to accept flexible types. Numeric and boolean fields accept both their strict type and string representations to accommodate API response variations.

NOTE: This schema has been updated to accept flexible types. Numeric and boolean fields accept both their strict type and string representations to accommodate API response variations.

DateTime.description: Timestamp in ISO 8601 format (includes time and optional offset).

Decimal.description: Arbitrary precision decimal represented as a string to avoid float rounding issues.

URI.description: Uniform Resource Identifier or URL string.

JSON.description: Arbitrary JSON value serialized as a string.

site_code.description: The unique identifier for the site. NOTE: This is derived from a source string code via a lookup map.

buyer.description: NOTE: Per engineering comment on 8/30/2023, the source field 'buyerr_email' is a temporary typo from the source system.

issuing_office_address.description: NOTE: Some fields are disabled due to receiving incorrect data from the source system as of 9/13/2023.

admin_office_address.description: NOTE: Some fields are disabled due to receiving incorrect data from the source system as of 9/13/2023.

x-update-note: Updated to accept string representations of numbers and booleans to match actual PRISM API response format
